title: SkillDefinition
description: Claude Code skill (slash command) frontmatter and body

description.description: When this skill should trigger — CC uses this to match user intent

body.description: The skill's instructions — tells CC exactly what to do when invoked

tools_used.description: Which CC tools this skill typically invokes

agents_spawned.description: Which custom agents this skill may spawn

memory_reads.description: Which memory files this skill reads

memory_writes.description: Which memory files this skill writes/updates

hooks_triggered.description: Which hooks fire as a result of this skill's actions

design_principles.progressive_disclosure: Start with the minimum needed, expand based on context
design_principles.separation: Skills define WHAT to do. Agents define WHO does it. Never mix.
design_principles.composability: Skills should be composable — one skill can invoke another
